heading: Individual liability of shareholders; compromises; authority of receiver
label: 67 Individual liability of shareholders; compromises; authority of receiver
text: Any receiver of a national banking association is authorized, with the approval of the Comptroller of the Currency and upon the order of a court of record of competent jurisdiction, to compromise, either before or after judgment, the individual liability of any shareholder of such association.
notes: Application to District of ColumbiaProvisions of this section were made applicable to banks, etc., in the District of Columbia by , .act Mar. 4, 1933, ch. 274, § 447 Stat. 1567

Exception as to Transfer of FunctionsFunctions vested by any provision of law in Comptroller of the Currency, referred to in this section, not included in transfer to Secretary of the Treasury, see note set out under .section 1 of this title
amendments: Application to District of ColumbiaProvisions of this section were made applicable to banks, etc., in the District of Columbia by , .act Mar. 4, 1933, ch. 274, § 447 Stat. 1567
